description_public: A polygenic estimate related to tendon and ligament property tendency variation in the general population.

CC.notes: This genotype is considered a typical pattern for the COL5A1 variant, with no strong signal toward either stiffer or more flexible tendon properties. Training load and technique are far more important for injury risk.

CT.notes: Some studies suggest this genotype may be linked to subtle differences in tendon or ligament properties. Any effect is likely small compared with training, recovery, and biomechanics.

TT.notes: This genotype has been associated in some research with different collagen characteristics, which may slightly change how tissues respond to load. This information is exploratory and should not be used to predict or diagnose injury.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for Tendon and ligament property tendency
evidence.quote: This genotype is considered a typical pattern for the COL5A1 variant, with no strong signal toward either stiffer or more flexible tendon properties. Training load and technique are far more important for injury risk.
